summary: Bulk Payment Feature Testing Complete - Backend API and Frontend UI both working correctly. POST /api/pms/group-folio/bulk-payment endpoint distributes payments across group bookings using 3 methods (proportional, equal, balance_only). Frontend dialog opens from 'Toplu Odeme' button with amount, distribution method, payment method, reference fields and distribution preview.
critical_code_review_comments: Bulk payment API correctly implements 3 distribution methods: proportional (by balance ratio), equal (split evenly), balance_only (only positive balances)
Frontend bulk payment dialog has proper data-testid attributes for all elements
Distribution preview calculates and displays payment breakdown per booking in real-time
Fill balance button correctly only shows when group has positive balance (condition: groupBalance > 0)
Success toast message shows count and total distributed after API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk payment feature fully tested. API endpoint POST /api/pms/group-folio/bulk-payment works with all 3 distribution methods. Frontend dialog accessible via data-testid='bulk-payment-btn' in group detail header.

tests.result: Only paid 1 booking with positive balance

button_visibility.details: Visible in group detail header when group has active bookings

distribution_preview.details: Shows breakdown per booking when amount > 0

api_integration.details: Successfully submits to API and shows toast with count and total distributed
